MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Jillian Donovan, Esq. (415.777.3200; jdonovan@hansonbridgett.com) of Hanson Bridgett LLP for Plaintiff, Sutter Bay Hospitals DBA California Pacific Medical Center.
Diana Miller, Esq. (713.927.9182; dmiller@millerlegalservices.net) specially appearing for and with Plaintiff in propria persona, Radhey Shyam, (415.518.4828; rshyam66@gmail.com).

A R G U E D. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

OSC RE: PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION is Taken Under Submission.
1) Parties to email the court at contestdept302tr@sftc.org first thing on (11/22/2022) Tuesday morning to inform the court whether or not the matter is moot. 2) If the matter is not moot, there will need to be a document labeled preliminary injunction and whether a bond connected with the preliminary injunction would be needed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. =(302/RBU)
